name: Phishing Attack Response (T1566)
description: Spearphishing incident response playbook with MITRE ATT&CK (T1566, T1204, T1078) and D3FEND (Email Removal, Homoglyph Detection, DNS Denylisting) mappings.

name: Ransomware Incident Response (T1486)
description: Ransomware response playbook covering encryption impact, lateral movement containment, and backup recovery. ATT&CK: T1486, T1490, T1021. D3FEND: Network Isolation, Backup Analysis.

name: Password Spraying Attack Response (T1110.003)
description: Identity-focused response to credential spraying attacks. ATT&CK: T1110.003, T1078, T1087. D3FEND: Account Locking, MFA, Credential Hardening.

name: Process Injection Incident Response (T1055)
description: Advanced threat response for process injection techniques including DLL injection and process hollowing. ATT&CK: T1055, T1059, T1003. D3FEND: Memory Analysis, Process Spawn Analysis.

name: Drive-by Compromise Response (T1189)
description: Web-based exploitation response covering exploit kits, malicious redirects, and C2 beaconing. ATT&CK: T1189, T1203, T1071. D3FEND: Web Filtering, Browser Isolation, URL Analysis.
